---
title: "Finanzas Públicas"
subtitle: "Deuda del Sector Público de Chile como % del PIB"
date: last-modified
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go

url = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Economia-y-politicas-publicas/chiledatos/main/data/finanzas_publicas.csv"

df = pd.read_csv(url, sep=",", encoding="utf-8")

df.columns = [
    "periodo", "deuda_bruta_gc", "deuda_neta_gc",
    "deuda_bruta_bc", "deuda_neta_bc",
    "deuda_bruta_sp", "deuda_neta_sp",
    "deuda_bruta_ep", "deuda_neta_ep",
]

cols_numericas = [
    "deuda_bruta_gc", "deuda_neta_gc",
    "deuda_bruta_bc", "deuda_neta_bc",
    "deuda_bruta_sp", "deuda_neta_sp",
    "deuda_bruta_ep", "deuda_neta_ep",
]
df[cols_numericas] = df[cols_numericas].apply(pd.to_numeric, errors="coerce")
df["fecha"] = pd.to_datetime(df["periodo"], format="%b.%Y", errors="coerce")
df = df.dropna(subset=["fecha"]).sort_values("fecha")

AUTOR = "Autor: Juan Miguieles Onetto | Fuente: Banco Central de Chile"

def agregar_autor(fig):
    fig.update_layout(
        annotations=[dict(
            text=AUTOR,
            x=0, y=-0.15,
            xref="paper", yref="paper",
            showarrow=False,
            font=dict(size=10, color="gray"),
            xanchor="left",
        )]
    )
    return fig
```




```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import os
import requests
import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

usuario = os.environ.get("BCENTRAL_USER")
password = os.environ.get("BCENTRAL_PASS")

URL_API = "https://si3.bcentral.cl/SieteRestWS/SieteRestWS.ashx"

def obtener_serie(codigo, dias=365):
    hoy = datetime.today()
    inicio = (hoy - timedelta(days=dias)).strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    fin = hoy.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    params = {
        "user": usuario,
        "pass": password,
        "function": "GetSeries",
        "timeseries": codigo,
        "firstdate": inicio,
        "lastdate": fin,
        "format": "json",
    }
    try:
        r = requests.get(URL_API, params=params, timeout=10)
        data = r.json()
        obs = data["Series"]["Obs"]
        df = pd.DataFrame(obs)
        col_fecha = "indexDateString" if "indexDateString" in df.columns else df.columns[0]
        col_valor = "value" if "value" in df.columns else df.columns[1]
        df["fecha"] = pd.to_datetime(df[col_fecha], format="%d-%m-%Y", errors="coerce")
        df["valor"] = pd.to_numeric(df[col_valor], errors="coerce")
        return df.dropna(subset=["valor"]).sort_values("fecha").reset_index(drop=True)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error cargando {codigo}: {e}")
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=["fecha", "valor"])

def grafico_linea(df, titulo, ytitle, color, formato_y=".2f", prefijo="", sufijo=""):
    if df.empty:
        return go.Figure()
    ultimo = df["valor"].iloc[-1]
    fecha = df["fecha"].iloc[-1].strftime("%d/%m/%Y")
    minimo = df["valor"].min()
    maximo = df["valor"].max()
    margen = (maximo - minimo) * 0.05
    fig = go.Figure()
    fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=df["fecha"], y=df["valor"],
        mode="lines",
        line=dict(color=color, width=2),
        fill="tozeroy",
        fillcolor=color.replace(")", ",0.1)").replace("rgb", "rgba"),
        hovertemplate=f"<b>%{{x|%d %b %Y}}</b><br>{prefijo}%{{y:{formato_y}}}{sufijo}<extra></extra>",
    ))
    fig.update_layout(
        title=dict(text=f"{titulo} — Último: {prefijo}{ultimo:{formato_y}}{sufijo} ({fecha})", font=dict(size=15)),
        yaxis=dict(title=ytitle, tickformat=formato_y, tickprefix=prefijo, ticksuffix=sufijo, range=[minimo - margen, maximo + margen]),
        xaxis=dict(dtick="M1", tickformat="%b %Y", tickangle=45, tickfont=dict(size=10)),
        template="plotly_white",
        font_family="Inter",
        height=380,
        margin=dict(b=100, t=60),
        annotations=[dict(
            text="Autor: Juan Miguieles Onetto | Fuente: Banco Central de Chile",
            x=0, y=-0.3, xref="paper", yref="paper",
            showarrow=False, font=dict(size=9, color="gray"), xanchor="left",
        )],
    )
    return fig

def variacion(df):
    if len(df) < 2:
        return 0, "gray"
    v = ((df["valor"].iloc[-1] - df["valor"].iloc[-2]) / df["valor"].iloc[-2]) * 100
    color = "#2ecc71" if v >= 0 else "#e74c3c"
    return v, color

ultima_actualizacion = datetime.today().strftime("%d/%m/%Y %H:%M")

fondossoberanos   = obtener_serie("F051.C19.STO.C.Z.USD.M")
fees    = obtener_serie("F051.C17.STO.C.Z.USD.M")
frp   = obtener_serie("F051.C15.STO.C.Z.USD.M")
oatp  = obtener_serie("F051.M2.STO.C.Z.USD.M")
pesos   = obtener_serie("F051.M21.STO.C.Z.USD.M")
dolar = obtener_serie("F051.M22.STO.C.Z.USD.M")
fondoeduc = obtener_serie("F051.C181.STO.C.Z.USD.M")
fpe = obtener_serie("F051.C181.STO.C.Z.USD.M")
fapr = obtener_serie("F051.M11.STO.C.Z.USD.M")
tratamientoaltocosto = obtener_serie("F051.M12.STO.C.Z.USD.M")


```



```{python}
grafico_linea(fondossoberanos, "Activos consolidados totales (millones de dólares)", "Millones de dólares",
              color="rgb(52,152,219)", formato_y=",.0f", prefijo="$").show()

grafico_linea(fees, "Activos consolidados totales (millones de dólares)", "Millones de dólares",
              color="rgb(52,152,219)", formato_y=",.0f", prefijo="$").show()

```












## 1. Gobierno Central

```{python}
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_bruta_gc"],
    name="Deuda bruta", line=dict(color="#e74c3c"),
))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_neta_gc"],
    name="Deuda neta", line=dict(color="#2980b9"),
))
fig.add_hline(y=0, line_dash="dash", line_color="gray", opacity=0.5)
fig.update_layout(
    title="Gobierno Central: deuda bruta y neta (% del PIB)",
    yaxis_title="% del PIB",
    xaxis_title="Período",
    template="plotly_white",
    font_family="Inter",
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.2, x=0.5, xanchor="center"),
    margin=dict(b=80),
)
agregar_autor(fig)
fig.show()
```

## 2. Banco Central

```{python}
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_bruta_bc"],
    name="Deuda bruta", line=dict(color="#e74c3c"),
))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_neta_bc"],
    name="Deuda neta", line=dict(color="#2980b9"),
))
fig.add_hline(y=0, line_dash="dash", line_color="gray", opacity=0.5)
fig.update_layout(
    title="Banco Central: deuda bruta y neta (% del PIB)",
    yaxis_title="% del PIB",
    xaxis_title="Período",
    template="plotly_white",
    font_family="Inter",
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.2, x=0.5, xanchor="center"),
    margin=dict(b=80),
)
agregar_autor(fig)
fig.show()
```

## 3. Sector Público Consolidado

```{python}
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_bruta_sp"],
    name="Deuda bruta", line=dict(color="#e74c3c"),
    fill="tozeroy", fillcolor="rgba(231,76,60,0.1)",
))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_neta_sp"],
    name="Deuda neta", line=dict(color="#2980b9"),
))
fig.add_hline(y=0, line_dash="dash", line_color="gray", opacity=0.5)
fig.update_layout(
    title="Sector Público Consolidado: deuda bruta y neta (% del PIB)",
    yaxis_title="% del PIB",
    xaxis_title="Período",
    template="plotly_white",
    font_family="Inter",
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.2, x=0.5, xanchor="center"),
    margin=dict(b=80),
)
agregar_autor(fig)
fig.show()
```

## 4. Empresas Públicas

```{python}
fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_bruta_ep"],
    name="Deuda bruta", line=dict(color="#e74c3c"),
))
fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=df["fecha"], y=df["deuda_neta_ep"],
    name="Deuda neta", line=dict(color="#2980b9"),
))
fig.add_hline(y=0, line_dash="dash", line_color="gray", opacity=0.5)
fig.update_layout(
    title="Empresas Públicas: deuda bruta y neta (% del PIB)",
    yaxis_title="% del PIB",
    xaxis_title="Período",
    template="plotly_white",
    font_family="Inter",
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.2, x=0.5, xanchor="center"),
    margin=dict(b=80),
)
agregar_autor(fig)
fig.show()
```
